dologger.commands.error.players_only: Only players can use this command.

dologger.commands.revert.dimension_unava: The previewed dimension is no longer available.

dologger.commands.restore.no_results: No currently reverted block changes matched the restore filters.

dologger.commands.restore.dimension_unav: The previewed dimension is no longer available.
